headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, location names

body.usage: General UI text, descriptions, chat messages

mono.usage: System stats, dataspace coordinates, AI thought processes

grid_system.village_map: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 auto-rows-[300px]

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-cinzel font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#F5E08E] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] rounded-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-[#D4AF37] hover:border-[#D4AF37] transition-all duration-300 font-manrope rounded-sm
buttons.rune: relative overflow-hidden group border border-[#7B68EE]/30 bg-[#7B68EE]/5 hover:bg-[#7B68EE]/10 text-[#7B68EE] font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest

cards.base: bg-[#0F0F11]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#27272A] p-6 rounded-sm shadow-2xl hover:border-[#7B68EE]/50 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.chat: bg-[#0F0F11] border-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] placeholder:text-[#27272A] text-[#E1E1E3] font-manrope rounded-sm p-4 shadow-inner

effects: Use 'grayscale hover:grayscale-0' transition for inactive characters

implementation_steps.title: Setup Base Styles
implementation_steps.action: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette (obsidian, gold, slate-blue) and add the fonts (Cinzel, Manrope). Add the @import to index.css.

implementation_steps.title: Create Layout Shell
implementation_steps.action: Build the main layout wrapper with the sidebar for Village/Map and the main content area for Dialogue/Dataspace. Use absolute positioning for the 'Immersive Mode'.

implementation_steps.title: Build Core Components
implementation_steps.action: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input, Dialog, ScrollArea). Strip the default radius to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a sharper, fantasy feel. Remove white backgrounds, switch to dark glass.

implementation_steps.title: Develop Landing Page
implementation_steps.action: Create the 'World Entry' page using the mist mountain image as a full-screen background. Add a 'Connect to Neural Link' button.

implementation_steps.title: Implement Village & Chat
implementation_steps.action: Create the split view: Visual representation of location (top/back) + Dialogue Interface (bottom/front). Ensure the chat feels like a script, not a WhatsApp message.

implementation_steps.title: Global Dataspace
implementation_steps.action: Create a visualization page using the abstract network images or a canvas particle system to represent the AI's growing knowledge.

do: Use 'backdrop-blur' heavily to separate layers without solid opacity.
Use 'sonner' for all in-game notifications (e.g., 'Relationship improved').
Keep text contrast high: light grey on black, NOT dark grey on black.
Make the AI responses feel 'alive' by adding subtle typing animations or glowing borders when it 'thinks'.
avoid: Don't use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. This is not a SaaS tool. Keep edges sharp or slightly rounded (sm).
Don't use standard bright blue/green system colors. Use the gold/slate palette.
Don't crowd the interface. Fantasy interfaces need 'breathing room' (negative space).
